title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : appel d'offres et réponse fournisseur
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions.

passages.label: Demande de devis
passages.text:
From: Procurement Department, Nexus Corp
To: Approved Suppliers
Subject: Request for Quotation — Office Furniture

Dear Supplier,

Nexus Corp is seeking quotations for the supply and delivery of office furniture for our new branch opening in March. Required items include: 40 adjustable desks, 40 ergonomic chairs, 10 meeting room tables, and 40 meeting room chairs.

Please provide your best price for all items, including delivery to our address at 18 Commerce Avenue, and confirm whether you can guarantee delivery by February 28th.

Quotations must be submitted by January 10th. Late submissions will not be considered.

Contact: procurement@nexuscorp.com

passages.label: Réponse du fournisseur
passages.text:
From: FurniPro Solutions
To: Procurement Department, Nexus Corp
Subject: Quotation — Office Furniture

Dear Nexus Corp Procurement Team,

Thank you for including us in your request. Please find our quotation below:

— 40 adjustable desks: $320 each ($12,800 total)
— 40 ergonomic chairs: $180 each ($7,200 total)
— 10 meeting room tables: $450 each ($4,500 total)
— 40 meeting room chairs: $90 each ($3,600 total)

Delivery fee: $400 (flat rate to Commerce Avenue)
Total: $28,500

We can confirm delivery by February 20th, eight days before your deadline.

Note: A 5% discount applies to the total if payment is made within 15 days of invoice.

We look forward to your response.
FurniPro Solutions

questions.explanation: La demande de devis concerne "the supply and delivery of office furniture".

questions.prompt: What is the deadline for submitting quotations?
What is the total amount quoted by FurniPro, including delivery?
questions.explanation: La somme des postes est $28,100 + $400 de livraison = $28,500.

questions.prompt: How early can FurniPro deliver compared to Nexus Corp's deadline?
questions.explanation: FurniPro livre le 20 février, soit 8 jours avant la date limite du 28 février.

questions.prompt: What condition must be met to receive the 5% discount?
choices: Payment must be made within 15 days of invoice
Delivery must be confirmed in advance
The order must include all listed items
questions.explanation: "A 5% discount applies to the total if payment is made within 15 days of invoice".
